case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. STEPHANIE RAMIREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST; AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 (TRANSACTION ID # 64107808) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $368.80 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 64107808) AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, STEPHANIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, STEPHANIE $2,975.19 PRINCIPAL, $368.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,343.99, SEE SCANNED DOC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $82.44 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 64717154) (TRANSACTION ID # 64717154) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, STEPHANIE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100046556), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JUN-05-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, STEPHANIE
EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 64107808) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 66906282) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, STEPHANIE

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 64107808) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
